summary: CRITICAL BUG FIXED: BulkCategoryEditorModal component extraction verification. Found and fixed CATEGORY_OPTIONS undefined error and object-as-React-child errors that prevented the modal from opening.

minor.issue: Returns objects with {id, label, color} format which caused frontend rendering issues - handled in frontend

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning)

bugs_fixed.issue: CATEGORY_OPTIONS was undefined - caused ReferenceError when page loaded
bugs_fixed.fix: Added CATEGORY_OPTIONS constant with default values for material, rooms, styles, finishes

bugs_fixed.issue: Objects rendered as React children (error: object with keys {id, label, color})
bugs_fixed.fix: Added proper type handling for finishes, colors, and countries arrays to convert objects to strings

bugs_fixed.issue: ManageOptionsModal called with wrong props (open/onOpenChange vs isOpen/onClose)
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed props to match ManageOptionsModal component interface

critical_code_review_comments: SupplierProducts.js is now 7,804 lines - still large but more manageable after modal extraction
ESLint warnings for useEffect/useCallback missing dependencies remain (non-blocking)
All modal components properly receive props and render correctly after fixes
context_for_next_testing_agent: BulkCategoryEditorModal refactoring complete and verified. All 18 features tested and working: modal opens, header count, manage options, material dropdown, finish buttons, country of origin, rooms multi-select, styles multi-select, colors multi-select, sale labels, AI description generator, pricing fields, tier discounts button, templates section, summary section, cancel button, apply button, website preview panel.

BulkCategoryEditorModal.trigger: Click 'Edit Categories' button when products are selected
elements_verified: Modal opens without errors
Header shows correct count of selected products
Manage Options button opens ManageOptionsModal
Material dropdown selection works
Finish button selection (Matt, Gloss, Polished, Satin, Lappato, Natural, Honed, Textured, Structured)
Country of Origin selection (Italy, Spain, Europe, Poland, India, China, Turkey, Portugal, UK, Morocco, Vietnam, Brazil)
Rooms multi-select (Kitchen, Bathroom, Living Room, Bedroom, Hallway, Outdoor, Commercial)
Styles multi-select (Modern, Traditional, Contemporary, Rustic, Industrial, Minimalist, Mediterranean, Victorian)
Colors multi-select (White, Grey, Black, Beige, Cream, Brown, Blue, Green, Pink, Gold, Silver, Multicolour)
Sale Labels selection (SALE, NEW, BESTSELLER, LIMITED, CLEARANCE)
AI Description Generator checkbox and options
Pricing fields (Cost Price, List Price)
Set Tier Discounts button opens TierPricingModal
Templates section displays saved templates with Apply/Delete buttons
Summary section shows selected attributes
Cancel button closes modal
Apply button shows correct product count
Website Preview panel shows product info and Publish button

ManageOptionsModal.trigger: Click 'Manage Options' button in BulkCategoryEditorModal header
elements_verified: Modal opens with category tabs
All default categories displayed (Main Categories, Sub-Categories, Materials, Types, Finishes, etc.)
Custom categories displayed with delete button
Add Category button works
Add new option input field
Options list with edit and delete icons
Options count shown
